allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const code=fs.readFileSync\('C:/Project rohan/Alpha_Lens/frontend/stocks.js','utf8'\); eval\(code\); console.log\('OK count=', LOCAL_STOCKS.length\);")

PowerShell(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const code=fs.readFileSync\('C:/Project rohan/Alpha_Lens/frontend/stocks.js','utf8'\); eval\(code\); console.log\('OK count=', LOCAL_STOCKS.length\); console.log\('First:', JSON.stringify\(LOCAL_STOCKS[0]\)\); const q='re'; const matches = LOCAL_STOCKS.filter\(s => s.t.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(q\) || s.n.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(q\)\); console.log\('Matches for re:', matches.length\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(matches.slice\(0,5\)\)\);")

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/stocks.js" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "CONTENT-TYPE: $\($r.Headers['Content-Type']\)"; Write-Output "LENGTH: $\($r.Content.Length\)"; Write-Output "FIRST 200 CHARS:"; Write-Output $r.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(200, $r.Content.Length\)\) } catch { Write-Output "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
